caption:
Most agencies bill by the hour and figure it out as they go. Each month feels like month one.

We run every GLV client through the same five-step process. We research your market before we touch anything. Build in the right order. Execute week over week. Review what's working. Then it compounds.

Month six looks different from month one. That's what you're paying for.

Comment PROCESS below and I'll DM you the full process doc we walk every new client through.

Which of these steps do you think most agencies skip?
first_comment: Full process breakdown in the carousel. Comment PROCESS for the step-by-step doc or visit glvmarketing.ca
